channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: The 'Saturday Night Live' 50th anniversary celebration is finally here. Here's how to watch
item.description: Fifty seasons of “Saturday Night Live” sketches, songs and special guests will be celebrated as the variety show celebrates its landmark anniversary.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Elon's America: What Elon Musk did before DOGE
item.description: Elon Musk may be the face of DOGE, but he made a name for himself in businesses built around technology and space travel.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Sheryl Crow sells Tesla to donate funds to embattled NPR
item.description: “Money donated to NPR, which is under threat by President Musk, in hopes that the truth will continue to find its way to those willing to know the truth,” the country artist wrote.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Army redirecting millions collected from soldier BAS pay meant for food services elsewhere: report
item.description: Hundreds of millions of dollars taken out of U.S. Army soldiers' Basic Allowance for Subsistence (BAS) pay that is meant to help with food costs is being redirected elsewhere, a report found.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sheryl Crow sells Tesla to donate funds to embattled NPR
item.description: “Money donated to NPR, which is under threat by President Musk, in hopes that the truth will continue to find its way to those willing to know the truth,” the country artist wrote.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, KRON4

item.title: IRS will lay off thousands of probationary workers in the middle of tax season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The IRS will lay off thousands of probationary workers in the middle of tax season, according to two sources familiar with the agency's plans, and cuts could happen as soon as next week.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Wreckage of missing plane found in Florida woods
item.description: A plane that had gone missing Friday night was found early Saturday morning in a remote, wooded area in north Florida.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5

item.title: Cher, Lady Gaga, Miley Cyrus, Snoop Dogg: 'Saturday Night Live' is feted with a concert for the ages
item.description: By the time Cher sang “If I Could Turn Back Time,” it seemed as if time had indeed been turned back, and every single “Saturday Night Live” musical guest of 50 years had magically found their way to Radio City Music Hall. Of course, it was only a smattering.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER and JOCELYN NOVECK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AP reporter and photographer barred from Air Force One over 'Gulf of Mexico' terminology dispute
item.description: The White House barred a credentialed Associated Press reporter and photographer from boarding the presidential airplane Friday for a weekend trip with Donald Trump, saying the news agency’s stance on how to refer to the Gulf of Mexico was to blame for the exclusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What does 'Wawa' even mean? The company offers up a hint
item.description: In certain communities along the East Coast, the mere mention of the name “Wawa” conjures up visions of piping-hot coffee, scratch-off lottery tickets and pre-made Sizzli breakfast sandwiches.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Back-to-back earthquakes jolt Los Angeles area within hours
item.description: An earthquake with a preliminary magnitude of 3.5 rattled the L.A. metropolitan area early Saturday just hours after a 3.8-magnitude quake shook the Malibu area shortly before midnight Friday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Two men plead guilty for orchestrating $577M crypto Ponzi scheme
item.description: Sergei Potapenko and Ivan Turõgin, both 40, agreed to forfeit more than $400 million as part of their guilty pleas, per the Department of Justice.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Suzanne Simpson murder case: Texas defense for missing realtor's husband looking for holes in evidence trove
item.description: Suzanne Simpson vanished over four months ago, and her husband, charged with her murder, made an appearance in court, where attorneys discussed evidence in the case.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UFO expert says Trump's declassification could expose possible 'cover-up' spanning decades
item.description: An expert on UFOs breaks down the importance of President Trump declassifying government files he believes holds "the smoking gun" and answers to federal secrets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fiery multi-car pileup inside quarter-mile mountain tunnel leaves at least 2 dead, several injured
item.description: A deadly crash inside the Green River tunnel in southwestern Wyoming on Friday morning forced Interstate 80 to close in both directions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black Hawk pilots may have missed air traffic directive, flown on 'bad' altitude data before crash
item.description: It is likely the Black Hawk pilots “stepped on” the communication for less than a second by pressing the microphone key to communicate back to the control tower, she said.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, WGN 9

item.title: Alleged DOGE employees show up at San Francisco City Hall
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- An official with the San Francisco Sheriff’s Office confirmed to NewsNation affiliate KRON4 that it is investigating a report of three individuals claiming to be Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) employees who attempted to enter offices in San Francisco City Hall on
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Why you shouldn't leave your windshield wipers up during every snowstorm
item.description: Propping windshield wipers up before a snowstorm is a common routine for many car owners, but according to AAA, it's not always the best practice.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Homeowner pleads guilty to shooting Black teen Ralph Yarl who rang the wrong doorbell
item.description: LIBERTY, Mo. (AP) — An 86-year-old Kansas City man pleaded guilty Friday to a lesser charge in the 2023 shooting of Ralph Yarl, a Black honor student who rang the white man’s doorbell by mistake, in a case that shocked the country and renewed national debate about gun policies and race in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Proposed bill looks to make President Trump’s birthday a federal holiday
item.description: Rep. Claudia Tenney (R-N.Y.) announced Friday a proposed bill, the Establishment Act, which seeks to make President Trump’s birthday and Flag Day a federal holiday in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Daesha Gear, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Justice Department moves to dismiss Eric Adams case
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has formally asked a federal district court to drop its corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams (D) after federal prosecutors in Manhattan resigned rather than dismiss the case.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Vivek Ramaswamy will kick off his bid for Ohio governor in Cincinnati on Feb. 24
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Republican Vivek Ramaswamy is preparing to launch his 2026 bid for Ohio governor on Feb. 24 in his native Cincinnati, with ensuing announcements held over two days in the Columbus, Toledo and Cleveland areas, The Associated Press has learned.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Volunteers deliver gifts to widows on Valentine's Day. The project began in a florist's driveway
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jillian Myers knows the devastation of losing a husband and feeling alone and empty, particularly on Valentine's Day.
item.dc:creator: ERIK VERDUZCO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump border czar and NYC mayor interview with 'Fox & Friends' on immigration commitments
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Reestablishing an immigration office at New York's notorious Rikers Island jail is just the first step in a more complex agreement President Donald Trump's administration has reached with Democratic Mayor Eric Adams, the new U.S.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Park Service removes transgender references from LGBTQ historical site's website
item.description: The change, which has sparked an outcry among the LGBTQ+ community, came after President Trump signed an executive order directing federal agencies to recognize only two genders.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, KTLA 5

item.title: US aircraft carrier collides with merchant vessel in Mediterranean Sea
item.description: The collision occurred between the Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Harry S. Truman (CVN 75) and the merchant vessel Besiktas-M, according to U.S. Navy spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Igloo recalling 1M+ coolers after fingertip amputations
item.description: Igloo has received 12 reports of fingertip injuries, including fingertip amputations, bone fractures and slashes.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, ABC 4

item.title: Senate confirms RFK Jr. as Health secretary; McConnell lone GOP dissenter
item.description: Longtime vaccine critic Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is now the nation’s top health official, after the Senate on Thursday voted almost entirely on party lines to confirm him atop a department of nearly 100,000 employees that runs 13 agencies.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, ABC 4

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds singer R. Kelly's convictions, 30-year prison term
item.description: R. Kelly’s racketeering and sex trafficking convictions, along with a 30-year prison sentence, were upheld Wednesday by a federal appeals court that concluded the singer exploited his fame for over a quarter century to sexually abuse girls and young women.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Military plane crashes near San Diego: authorities
item.description: Emergency crews are responding to reports of a military plane that crashed into the San Diego Bay near Shelter Island, according to the San Diego Fire-Rescue Department Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, WFLA, NBC

item.title: List: The more than 500 JOANN stores expected to close amid second bankruptcy filing
item.description: When JOANN filed for bankruptcy last month, the company said it expected all of its stores to remain open.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, ABC 4

item.title: When does a heartbeat start? South Carolina Supreme Court again takes up abortion issue
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — With a heartbeat abortion ban solidly in place in South Carolina, lawyers for the state and Planned Parenthood return to the state's highest court Wednesday to argue how restrictive the ban should be.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: School gym roof collapses under 350 tons of snow
item.description: A recent snowstorm that pummeled parts of Oregon caused the roof at a high school gym to collapse under the weight of about 700,000 pounds of snow, school officials said.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Government watchdogs fired by Trump sue his administration and ask a judge to reinstate them
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Eight government watchdogs have sued over their mass firing that removed oversight of President Donald Trump's new administration.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California city passes controversial homeless camping ban
item.description: The ordinance, which allows the city to fine those who help the homeless and makes it illegal for homeless people to camp on public property, was approved in a 6-1 vote after more than two hours of public comments.
item.dc:creator: Joey Horta, Fox 5

item.title: Italy prepares scenic, historic Olympic venues with games now one year away
item.description: This marks the first time Milan will host the Winter Olympics, with the opening ceremony scheduled at San Siro Stadium. The games will feature events in multiple locations, including hockey in a new arena in Milan and various alpine events in Cortina.
item.dc:creator: Matt Barnes, Fox 5

item.title: Inflation ticks up to 3 percent annual increase in January
item.description: The consumer price index (CPI) increased by 0.5 percent in January to hit an annual increase of 3.0 percent after advancing by 2.9 percent in December.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, ABC 4
